overview.description: The iShares iBonds 1-5 Year TIPS Ladder ETF (LDRI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is a fund-of-funds, tracking an equally-weighted index that staggers maturities across a portfolio of underlying iShares iBonds TIPS ETFs, all maturing within six years. Each underlying fund comprises US Treasury inflation-protected securities maturing annually. LDRI was launched on Nov 7, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: BlackRock iBonds 1-5 Year TIPS Ladder Index
